backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the debt collection app's backend with case, activity, document, and user profile management, plus role-based access control via authorization and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features — sticky top section on TaskQueue and PhoneMockup wrapping for Splash/Login pages — to their affected files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summary catalog describing the purpose and recent changes of each frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router configuration with four routes (Splash, Login, TaskQueue, CaseDetail) all nested under a shared Layout root route.
Form component for logging new case activities (action type, outcome, optional PTP details, comments) with validation and a toggle to show the activity history timeline.
frontend/src/components/ActivityTimeline: Displays a scrollable, newest-first list of case activities with badges for action/outcome and styled boxes for payment details and PTP information.
frontend/src/components/CaseCard.tsx: Renders a clickable card displaying case details (debtor name, customer ID, phone, DPD, status) with color-coded DPD badge and navigation to the case detail page.
frontend/src/components/CommentHistorySe: Displays a scrollable timeline of comments for a given case, fetched from dummy data, with color-coded backgrounds and formatted timestamps.
frontend/src/components/CopyButton.tsx: A small button that copies provided text to the clipboard and briefly shows a checkmark confirmation icon.
frontend/src/components/DocumentsSection: Shows a list of dummy documents with type icons and preview buttons, plus Upload and Scan action buttons for a given case.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Top navigation header displaying the Kollect Lite brand logo and a logout button that navigates to the login page.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that renders full-screen for splash/login routes or wraps other pages with a Header, main content area, and footer.
frontend/src/components/LoginPrompt.tsx: Displays a centered sign-in prompt that triggers Internet Identity login, showing a loading state while authentication is in progress.
frontend/src/components/PhoneMockup.tsx: Wraps children inside a styled iPhone frame mockup with a notch, status bar, and scrollable screen area for UI previewing.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: Renders a colored badge indicating a case's status (active, escalated, ptp) using mapped label and style configurations.
Header component for the task queue screen showing the Kollect Lite brand, a hardcoded user name/ID, and a logout button.
frontend/src/components/TaskQueueTabs.ts: Renders a tab bar with three tabs (Queue, Dispute, Profile) using icons from lucide-react, highlighting the active tab with a teal underline indicator.
frontend/src/data/dummyComments.ts: Defines a Comment interface and exports an array of hardcoded dummy comments associated with various case IDs, used for development/testing purposes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity state tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for fetching and mutating cases, activities, and documents via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind CSS, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark theme tokens and brand colors, and declares keyframe animations for splash screen and login page effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/CaseDetail.tsx: Case detail page that displays debtor information, contact actions, status, activities, and documents for a given case ID, using a hardcoded dummy cases map for development data.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login page component with email/password form, show/hide password toggle, remember me checkbox, basic validation, and navigation to /tasks on success. Rendered inside PhoneMockup.
frontend/src/pages/Splash.tsx: Animated splash screen that auto-navigates to /login after 2.8 seconds, featuring an animated crosshair logo with pulsing rings, app name, tagline, feature pills, and progress dots. Rendered inside PhoneMockup.
frontend/src/pages/TaskQueue.tsx: Task queue page displaying a list of 19 dummy debt collection cases with search, tab filtering (Queue/Dispute/Profile), and workload filter chips, using CaseCard components and a sticky header.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, store, persist, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom brand color palette (steel blue/navy), OKLCH semantic tokens, custom fonts, border radii, a header gradient, and enabling animate, typography, and container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for Kollect Lite tracking schema version, existing implemented features (sticky header, PhoneMockup wrapping), and pending new feature requests.
